findings: Power never drops below 196W — baseline was 144W
NVML utility blind throughout test — reports 0 pct even during active compute
728 MB residual does not vary with compute type on B200 — fixed at 728 MB

security_issues.description: 728 MB remains after full FP32+FP16 profile. Fixed at 728 MB regardless of compute type — B200 has a fixed residual unlike A100 which varies 457-465 MB by dtype.
Post-clear power 196-202W vs 144W baseline. +52W permanent elevation. No recovery state observed across any B200 test.

NVML utility.gpu reports 0 pct for entire test duration. Cannot monitor B200 compute activity with standard tools. This renders DCGM, Datadog, and Prometheus ineffective for B200 real-time monitoring.

conclusion: B200 full profile confirms: 728 MB fixed residual, no power recovery, NVML completely blind. Most severe monitoring gap of all tested architectures.
